name: CSL Limited
description: CSL Limited is a global biotechnology company that develops and delivers innovative biotherapies and influenza vaccines that save lives, help people with life-threatening medical conditions, and protect public health. The company operates through two main businesses: CSL Behring, a leader in providing life-saving plasma-derived and recombinant therapies, and CSL Seqirus, one of the largest influenza vaccine providers in the world. Headquartered in Melbourne, Australia, CSL is committed to research and development, delivering high-quality therapies to patients in more than 100 countries.
